query: SELECT id, name, lockedDescription, characterVisualDetails, characterConstraints FROM videoCharacters WHERE name LIKE '%Greg%' LIMIT 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute SELECT id, name, lockedDescription, characterVisualDetails, characterConstraints FROM videoCharacters WHERE name LIKE '%Greg%' LIMIT 3;

rows.name: Greg
rows.lockedDescription: Greg, Drummer of rock band BRANDED: A Caucasian male in his late 20s to early 30s with a fair skin tone. His hair is dark brown, short to medium length, thick, and styled with some volume on top, swept slightly back and to the side, maintaining a somewhat messy but controlled appearance. He has an oval-shaped face with a defined jawline and light stubble, giving a slightly rugged look. His eyes are dark brown, almond-shaped, and expressive. He appears to be of average height with a lean, athletic build. For this video, he wears a plain black t-shirt. He plays drums with aggressive energy, embodying the user's note "plays like he means it!!" CONSISTENCY RULE: This character's appearance MUST NOT change between scenes.
rows.characterVisualDetails: {"outfit":"Black torn t-shirt","instrument":"Large rock drum kit","position":"Rear stage, seated behind drum kit","props":"Drumsticks"}
rows.characterConstraints: MUST be seated behind large rock drum kit at all times. NEVER front stage. NEVER holding guitar or bass. NEVER standing at microphone.

rows.name: Greg
rows.lockedDescription: Greg, Drummer of rock band BRANDED: A Caucasian male in his late 20s to early 30s with a fair skin tone. His hair is dark brown, short to medium length, thick, and styled with some volume on top, swept slightly back and to the side, maintaining a somewhat messy but controlled appearance. He has an oval-shaped face with a defined jawline and light stubble, giving a slightly rugged look. His eyes are dark brown, almond-shaped, and expressive. He appears to be of average height with a lean, athletic build. For this video, he wears a plain black t-shirt. He plays drums with aggressive energy, embodying the user's note "plays like he means it!!" CONSISTENCY RULE: This character's appearance MUST NOT change between scenes. INSTRUMENT: Greg plays drums. He is always shown seated behind a full drum kit, never holding a guitar or standing at a microphone. CONSISTENCY RULE: always behind drum kit, never front-of-stage.
rows.characterVisualDetails: {"outfit":"Black torn t-shirt","instrument":"Large rock drum kit","position":"Rear stage, seated behind drum kit","props":"Drumsticks"}
rows.characterConstraints: MUST be seated behind large rock drum kit at all times. NEVER front stage. NEVER holding guitar or bass. NEVER standing at microphone.

rows.name: Greg
rows.lockedDescription: Greg, Drummer of rock band BRANDED: Caucasian male, late 20s to early 30s, lean and wiry athletic build. Short dark brown hair, slightly wavy, naturally tousled with no product — medium length on top, short at sides. Prominent angular jaw, high cheekbones, slightly hollow cheeks giving a sharp, angular face shape. Eyes are dark brown, wide-set, expressive, under straight brows. Clean-shaven, smooth fair skin. Straight nose, medium width. Slim neck. For this video: black sleeveless band t-shirt, black jeans. Plays drums with explosive, aggressive energy. CONSISTENCY RULE: This character's appearance MUST NOT change between scenes. INSTRUMENT: Greg plays drums. He is always shown seated behind a full drum kit, never holding a guitar or standing at a microphone. CONSISTENCY RULE: always behind drum kit, never front-of-stage.
rows.characterVisualDetails: {"outfit":"Black torn t-shirt","instrument":"Large rock drum kit","position":"Rear stage, seated behind drum kit","props":"Drumsticks"}
rows.characterConstraints: MUST be seated behind large rock drum kit at all times. NEVER front stage. NEVER holding guitar or bass. NEVER standing at microphone.
